name: Soybean Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the dry soybeans in 3 cups of water until tender, about 2 1/2 hours. Drain and cool.
2. Grind or blend the cooked soybeans to make 1 cup.
3. Peel the eggplant and cube it. In a saucepan, combine the cubed eggplant with diced onion and 3 to 4 minced garlic cloves. Cook in enough oil to cover the bottom of the pan until the onion is tender.
4. Add oats, wheat germ, soybean mixture, and salt to the eggplant mixture. Stir in 2 tablespoons water. The dough should have a paste-like consistency.
5. Press the dough into patties and fry in 1/4 inch of oil until done on both sides.
6. To make the gravy, sauté chopped onions, 2 minced garlic cloves, and mushrooms in butter until the mushrooms are tender. Dissolve arrowroot in 1/2 cup water and add to the mushroom mixture. Cook and stir until thickened. Add tamari. Serve patties with gravy.
